text.title: devops-elk-index-management Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for devops-elk-index-management. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Every log source MUST have an index template with explicit field mappings before ingestion starts. The template MUST set number_of_shards, number_of_replicas, index.lifecycle.name, index.lifecycle.rollover_alias, and index.refresh_interval. keyword fields MUST NOT also be mapped as text unless full-text search on that field is required.
rule.rationale: Elasticsearch auto-mapping creates dual text+keyword mappings for all string fields, doubling fielddata memory usage and index size. Incorrect shard counts cannot be changed after index creation without reindex.
